name: Creamy Lemon Pie (Gfdm86a)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Beat egg yolks and stir in sweetened condensed milk, lemon juice, and yellow food coloring (if desired).
3. Pour mixture into graham cracker or regular crust.
4. Bake for 8 minutes.
5. Cool and chill thoroughly.
6. Spread whipped topping over the chilled pie.
